use_cases: Displaying feature status indicators on roadmap items
Showing category labels for roadmap entries
Indicating priority levels or progress states
Tagging roadmap items with custom labels
Providing visual distinction between roadmap categories
ai_summary: A lightweight Badge component built with class-variance-authority featuring rounded pill styling and four variants (default, secondary, destructive, outline). Ships with standard shadcn/ui patterns including focus rings and hover transitions. Designed as a reusable status indicator for roadmap cards and product planning interfaces.
